verses.6: Litunthira qawman ma onthira abaohum fahum ghafiloona
verses.7: Laqad haqqa alqawlu AAala aktharihim fahum la yuminoona
verses.8: Inna jaAAalna fee aAAnaqihim aghlalan fahiya ila alathqani fahum muqmahoona
verses.9: WajaAAalna min bayni aydeehim saddan wamin khalfihim saddan faaghshaynahum fahum la yubsiroona
verses.10: Wasawaon AAalayhim aanthartahum am lam tunthirhum la yuminoona
verses.11: Innama tunthiru mani ittabaAAa alththikra wakhashiya alrrahmana bialghaybi fabashshirhu bimaghfiratin waajrin kareemin
verses.12: Inna nahnu nuhyee almawta wanaktubu ma qaddamoo waatharahum wakulla shayin ahsaynahu fee imamin mubeenin
verses.13: Waidrib lahum mathalan ashaba alqaryati ith jaaha almursaloona
verses.14: Ith arsalna ilayhimu ithnayni fakaththaboohuma faAAazzazna bithalithin faqaloo inna ilaykum mursaloona
verses.15: Qaloo ma antum illa basharun mithluna wama anzala alrrahmanu min shayin in antum illa takthiboona
verses.16: Qaloo rabbuna yaAAlamu inna ilaykum lamursaloona
verses.18: Qaloo inna tatayyarna bikum lain lam tantahoo lanarjumannakum walayamassannakum minna AAathabun aleemun
verses.19: Qaloo tairukum maAAakum ain thukkirtum bal antum qawmun musrifoona
verses.20: Wajaa min aqsa almadeenati rajulun yasAAa qala ya qawmi ittabiAAoo almursaleena
verses.21: IttabiAAoo man la yasalukum ajran wahum muhtadoona
verses.22: Wama liya la aAAbudu allathee fataranee wailayhi turjaAAoona
verses.23: Aattakhithu min doonihi alihatan in yuridni alrrahmanu bidurrin la tughni AAannee shafaAAatuhum shayan wala yunqithooni
verses.26: Qeela odkhuli aljannata qala ya layta qawmee yaAAlamoona
verses.27: Bima ghafara lee rabbee wajaAAalanee mina almukrameena
verses.28: Wama anzalna AAala qawmihi min baAAdihi min jundin mina alssamai wama kunna munzileena
verses.29: In kanat illa sayhatan wahidatan faitha hum khamidoona
verses.30: Ya hasratan AAala alAAibadi ma yateehim min rasoolin illa kanoo bihi yastahzioona
verses.31: Alam yaraw kam ahlakna qablahum mina alqurooni annahum ilayhim la yarjiAAoona
verses.32: Wain kullun lamma jameeAAun ladayna muhdaroona
verses.33: Waayatun lahumu alardu almaytatu ahyaynaha waakhrajna minha habban faminhu yakuloona
verses.34: WajaAAalna feeha jannatin min nakheelin waaAAnabin wafajjarna feeha mina alAAuyooni
verses.35: Liyakuloo min thamarihi wama AAamilathu aydeehim afala yashkuroona
verses.36: Subhana allathee khalaqa alazwaja kullaha mimma tunbitu alardu wamin anfusihim wamimma la yaAAlamoona
verses.37: Waayatun lahumu allaylu naslakhu minhu alnnahara faitha hum muthlimoona
verses.38: Waalshshamsu tajree limustaqarrin laha thalika taqdeeru alAAazeezi alAAaleemi
verses.39: Waalqamara qaddarnahu manazila hatta AAada kaalAAurjooni alqadeemi
verses.40: La alshshamsu yanbaghee laha an tudrika alqamara wala allaylu sabiqu alnnahari wakullun fee falakin yasbahoona
verses.41: Waayatun lahum anna hamalna thurriyyatahum fee alfulki almashhooni
verses.42: Wakhalaqna lahum min mithlihi ma yarkaboona
verses.43: Wain nasha nughriqhum fala sareekha lahum wala hum yunqathoona
verses.44: Illa rahmatan minna wamataAAan ila heenin
verses.45: Waitha qeela lahumu ittaqoo ma bayna aydeekum wama khalfakum laAAallakum turhamoona
verses.46: Wama tateehim min ayatin min ayati rabbihim illa kanoo AAanha muAArideena
verses.47: Waitha qeela lahum anfiqoo mimma razaqakumu Allahu qala allatheena kafaroo lillatheena amanoo anutAAimu man law yashao Allahu atAAamahu in antum illa fee dalalin mubeenin
verses.48: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena
verses.49: Ma yanthuroona illa sayhatan wahidatan takhuthuhum wahum yakhissimoona
verses.50: Fala yastateeAAoona tawsiyatan wala ila ahlihim yarjiAAoona
verses.51: Wanufikha fee alssoori faitha hum mina alajdathi ila rabbihim yansiloona
verses.52: Qaloo ya waylana man baAAathana min marqadina hatha ma waAAada alrrahmanu wasadaqa almursaloona
verses.53: In kanat illa sayhatan wahidatan faitha hum jameeAAun ladayna muhdaroona
verses.54: Faalyawma la tuthlamu nafsun shayan wala tujzawna illa ma kuntum taAAmaloona
verses.55: Inna ashaba aljannati alyawma fee shughulin fakihoona
verses.56: Hum waazwajuhum fee thilalin AAala alaraiki muttakioona
verses.57: Lahum feeha fakihatun walahum ma yaddaAAoona
verses.60: Alam aAAhad ilaykum ya banee adama an la taAAbudoo alshshaytana innahu lakum AAaduwwun mubeenun
verses.62: Walaqad adalla minkum jibillan katheeran afalam takoonoo taAAqiloona
verses.65: Alyawma nakhtimu AAala afwahihim watukallimuna aydeehim watashhadu arjuluhum bima kanoo yaksiboona
verses.66: Walaw nashao latamasna AAala aAAyunihim faistabaqoo alssirata faanna yubsiroona
verses.67: Walaw nashao lamasakhnahum AAala makanatihim fama istataAAoo mudiyyan wala yarjiAAoona
verses.68: Waman nuAAammirhu nunakkishu fee alkhalqi afala yaAAqiloona
verses.69: Wama AAallamnahu alshshiAAra wama yanbaghee lahu in huwa illa thikrun waquranun mubeenun
verses.70: Liyunthira man kana hayyan wayahiqqa alqawlu AAala alkafireena
verses.71: Awalam yaraw anna khalaqna lahum mimma AAamilat aydeena anAAaman fahum laha malikoona
verses.72: Wathallalnaha lahum faminha rakoobuhum waminha yakuloona
verses.73: Walahum feeha manafiAAu wamasharibu afala yashkuroona
verses.74: Waittakhathoo min dooni Allahi alihatan laAAallahum yunsaroona
verses.75: La yastateeAAoona nasrahum wahum lahum jundun muhdaroona
verses.76: Fala yahzunka qawluhum inna naAAlamu ma yusirroona wama yuAAlinoona
verses.77: Awalam yara alinsanu anna khalaqnahu min nutfatin faitha huwa khaseemun mubeenun
verses.78: Wadaraba lana mathalan wanasiya khalqahu qala man yuhyee alAAithama wahiya rameemun
verses.79: Qul yuhyeeha allathee anshaaha awwala marratin wahuwa bikulli khalqin AAaleemun
verses.80: Allathee jaAAala lakum mina alshshajari alakhdari naran faitha antum minhu tooqidoona
verses.81: Awalaysa allathee khalaqa alssamawati waalarda biqadirin AAala an yakhluqa mithlahum bala wahuwa alkhallaqu alAAaleemu
verses.82: Innama amruhu itha arada shayan an yaqoola lahu kun fayakoonu
verses.83: Fasubhana allathee biyadihi malakootu kulli shayin wailayhi turjaAAoona
